author: @ai_founder_demo
text: We did not fake the benchmark. The issue is in the competitor's eval harness, and we will publish reproduction scripts today.

author: u/evalwatch
text: DemoAI founder is now arguing with BenchArena maintainers about the benchmark harness. Links to the X thread and repo issue inside.

author: ai_demo_channel
text: DemoAI benchmark fight is spreading. Maintainers say a patch is coming, founder says the accusation is misleading.

author: @startup_ops_demo
text: The launch rollback was painful, but the team is still here. Please stop inventing layoff rumors.

author: u/productfailwatch
text: LaunchLab rolled back the new AI agent feature after users posted broken outputs and pricing complaints.

author: rumor_demo
text: Unconfirmed: a small AI coding startup may be raising at a big valuation after the founder teased investor meetings.
